MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANTS NASIR PATEL AND NASREEN PATEL'S Motion To Compel Plaintiffs' Depositions And Notice Of Request For Sanctions Against Plaintiffs - Motion to compel the three plaintiffs to appear for oral deposition is granted. Said depositions shall take place within ten days of the date of this order or such other date as counsel shall agree. Monetary sanctions are awarded as against said plaintiffs and their attorney in the amount of $535.00. Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.
